title: Workbench Health Triage
description: Inspect the repository workbench health and produce a compact status report with evidence.
prompt: Evaluate the current codex-toys workbench health. Use read-only commands where possible. Report the key status from workbench doctor and workbench overview, and call out any attention items with exact evidence. Do not use codex exec.

checklist: Prefer the native App terminal or tools to inspect workbench health.
If codex-toys affordances are available in the profile, use `codex-toys workbench doctor --json` and `codex-toys workbench overview --json`.
affordanceHints: Native App can inspect terminal output directly.
